subcodes.first_line: The mention of God, in the form of fire within this light, hath in this Revelation been witnessed from the horizon of glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله علی هیئه النار فی هذا النور قد کان فی هذا الظهور عن افق العز مشهودا
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
